title: Qadmoniy #6935
definition:
Kadmonites = "easterners"

 1) a people who occupied the land of Canaan when God promised it to Abram
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kadmonites = "easterners"

 1) a people who occupied the land of Canaan when God promised it to Abram

    NASB:  easterners, a tribe whose land Abraham was to inherit
